description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a prominent red gable roof and a mix of brick and light-colored wall finishes. The structure features a main house with a large triangular roof and an attached flat-roofed garage or extension. The property is surrounded by well-maintained hedges and trees, with a paved driveway leading to the garage and a separate pedestrian path. Large windows are present on the front and sides, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The garden area includes a patio with outdoor seating, and the house is bordered by two intersecting streets, suggesting a corner lot in a suburban neighborhood.
description: A modern bungalow with a red gable roof, brick and light walls, large windows, attached garage, and landscaped garden on a corner lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, main entrance, large windows, and patio area with outdoor seating.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, three front-facing windows, and the hedge-lined garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage entrance, and a row of trees along the property edge.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the flat-roofed garage extension, side windows, and the intersection of two streets.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side windows
